scripts.format: prettier --write package.json README.md CHANGELOG.md docs/TODO.md docs/api-design.md docs/api-stability.md docs/dynamic-layout.md docs/getting-started.md docs/hot-path-optimization-notes.md docs/performance-comparison.md docs/release-v1.9.md docs/release-v2.0.md docs/release-v2.1.md docs/schema-compatibility.md docs/schema-grammar.md docs/schema-grammar.ko.md scripts/browser-smoke.mjs scripts/consumer-smoke.mjs scripts/shared-writer-stress.mjs packages/bench/index.mjs packages/bench/dynamic-layout.mjs packages/compiler/bin/zeno-codegen.mjs packages/compiler/src/analyzer.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter-ast.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter-names.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter-template.ts packages/compiler/src/index.ts packages/compiler/src/lowering.ts packages/compiler/src/source-map.ts packages/compiler/src/validator.ts packages/runtime/src/abi.ts packages/runtime/src/byte-vectors.ts packages/runtime/src/fixed.ts packages/runtime/src/fixed-arrays.ts packages/runtime/src/index.ts packages/runtime/src/scalar-vector.ts packages/runtime/src/vector-base.ts packages/runtime/src/view-base.ts packages/runtime/src/writer.ts packages/runtime/src/writer-arena.ts packages/schema/src/index.ts tests/abi-contract.test.ts tests/compiler/analyzer.test.ts tests/compiler/emitter-ast.test.ts tests/compiler/generated-e2e.test.ts tests/compiler/schema-grammar.test.ts tests/compiler/source-map.test.ts tests/compiler/snapshot.test.ts tests/public-api.test.ts tests/runtime/dynamic-layout.test.ts tests/runtime/property.test.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .github/**/*.yml "examples/basic/src/main.ts" "examples/webgl-instance-streamer/**/*.{ts,css,md,json,html}"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json README.md CHANGELOG.md docs/TODO.md docs/api-design.md docs/api-stability.md docs/dynamic-layout.md docs/getting-started.md docs/hot-path-optimization-notes.md docs/performance-comparison.md docs/release-v1.9.md docs/release-v2.0.md docs/release-v2.1.md docs/schema-compatibility.md docs/schema-grammar.md docs/schema-grammar.ko.md scripts/browser-smoke.mjs scripts/consumer-smoke.mjs scripts/shared-writer-stress.mjs packages/bench/index.mjs packages/bench/dynamic-layout.mjs packages/compiler/bin/zeno-codegen.mjs packages/compiler/src/analyzer.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter-ast.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter-names.ts packages/compiler/src/emitter-template.ts packages/compiler/src/index.ts packages/compiler/src/lowering.ts packages/compiler/src/source-map.ts packages/compiler/src/validator.ts packages/runtime/src/abi.ts packages/runtime/src/byte-vectors.ts packages/runtime/src/fixed.ts packages/runtime/src/fixed-arrays.ts packages/runtime/src/index.ts packages/runtime/src/scalar-vector.ts packages/runtime/src/vector-base.ts packages/runtime/src/view-base.ts packages/runtime/src/writer.ts packages/runtime/src/writer-arena.ts packages/schema/src/index.ts tests/abi-contract.test.ts tests/compiler/analyzer.test.ts tests/compiler/emitter-ast.test.ts tests/compiler/generated-e2e.test.ts tests/compiler/schema-grammar.test.ts tests/compiler/source-map.test.ts tests/compiler/snapshot.test.ts tests/public-api.test.ts tests/runtime/dynamic-layout.test.ts tests/runtime/property.test.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .github/**/*.yml "examples/basic/src/main.ts" "examples/webgl-instance-streamer/**/*.{ts,css,md,json,html}"
scripts.check: npm run version:check && npm run package:policy && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run clean && npm run build && npm test && npm run shared:stress && npm run codegen:basic
scripts.pack:check: npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-types && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-schema && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-runtime && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-compiler
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run pack:check && npm run consumer:smoke
scripts.bench: npm run codegen:basic && npm run build && node --expose-gc ./packages/bench/index.mjs
scripts.browser:smoke: npm run build && npm run example:webgl:build && node ./scripts/browser-smoke.mjs
